name: Arabian Tea House
desc: Traditional Emirati dining in historic Al Fahidi. Balaleet, harees and karak in a gorgeous courtyard setting.

name: Al Fanar Restaurant
desc: Heritage Emirati cuisine with a dhow-inspired interior. A proper introduction to traditional UAE food.

name: Logma
desc: Modern Emirati comfort food with a contemporary twist. Chebab pancakes and luqaimat to die for.

name: Sikka Cafe
desc: Local Emirati flavours in a relaxed City Walk setting. Great for a casual introduction to Emirati cuisine.

name: Bu Qtair
desc: Legendary beachside seafood shack in Jumeirah. Fried fish and prawns on plastic chairs. An absolute Dubai icon.

name: Calicut Paragon
desc: Famous Kerala cuisine with incredible fish curries, appam and biriyani straight from the Malabar coast.

name: Saravana Bhavan
desc: Iconic global vegetarian chain famous for its dosas and South Indian breakfast spreads done just right.

name: A2B Veg Restaurant
desc: South Indian comfort food classics — idli, vada, dosa and filter coffee. Consistent and always satisfying.

name: Sangeetha Veg
desc: Affordable dosa and thali done with care. The meal deals are a steal and the sambar is always on point.

name: Bait Al Mandi
desc: Traditional slow-cooked mandi rice with tender lamb or chicken. A proper Yemeni communal experience.

name: Najd Palace
desc: Classic Yemeni rice dishes served generous and aromatic. Locals know this place well and love it.

name: Mamaesh
desc: Palestinian street food done with heart. The musakhan and knafeh are the real stars here.

name: Pak Liyari
desc: Authentic Pakistani biryani that hits every time. Rich, aromatic and generous portions at honest prices.

name: Pak Punjab Restaurant
desc: Homestyle Pakistani meals that feel like someone's mum cooked them. Honest, warm and deeply filling.

name: Des Pardes
desc: Traditional Pakistani food with daal, karahi and roti at prices that make you want to come back daily.

name: Kabab Al Afghani
desc: Authentic Afghan kebabs grilled over charcoal. Simple, smoky and absolutely worth seeking out.

name: Afghan Khorasan
desc: Popular Afghan BBQ spot known for its charcoal-grilled meats and fragrant rice dishes.

name: Little Manila
desc: Filipino street food that brings a taste of Manila to Satwa. Sinigang, lechon and halo-halo done right.

name: Hot Palayok
desc: Authentic Filipino comfort food — adobo, kare-kare and lechon kawali that'll make you feel at home.
vibe: Filipino home cooking away from home

name: Eat and Drink Restaurant
desc: Classic late night cafeteria in Satwa. The place to be after midnight for shawarma and fresh juice.

name: Falafel Al Rabiah
desc: No-frills falafel sandwich spot that does one thing perfectly. Crispy, fresh and dangerously addictive.

name: Al Ijaza Cafeteria
desc: Legendary shawarma spot in Jumeirah beloved by locals for decades. The garlic sauce is the secret weapon.

name: Shater Abbas
desc: Persian kebab classic in Deira. Saffron-marinated koobideh and juicy barg that melt in your mouth.

name: Project Chaiwala
desc: Modern chai cafe bringing desi tea culture to the arts district. Creative chai flavours in a cool setting.

name: Filli Cafe
desc: The home of karak tea in Dubai. Silky, spiced and satisfying — the chai that built a loyal city-wide following.

name: Tea Junction
desc: Quick tea and snacks done cheap and cheerful. The go-to spot for a karak and samosa in Karama.

name: Dampa Seafood Grill
desc: Filipino-style seafood boil with crabs, prawns and clams tossed in bold sauces. Messy, fun and delicious.

name: The Sum of Us
desc: One of Dubai's most beloved brunch cafes. Incredible sourdough, great coffee and warm welcoming vibes.

name: Tom & Serg
desc: Industrial-chic brunch hotspot in Al Quoz. Creative plates, excellent coffee and a cool warehouse feel.

name: Nightjar Coffee
desc: Indie coffee roastery in the Alserkal arts district. Serious about coffee, laid-back about everything else.

name: Common Grounds
desc: Reliable all-day brunch cafe with solid coffee and feel-good plates. Consistent and always comfortable.

name: Brunch & Cake
desc: Instagram brunch heaven with beautiful plates, decadent cakes and a pastel aesthetic that delights.

name: Home Bakery
desc: Beloved dessert cafe known for its irresistible cakes, cookies and pastries. Always a queue for a reason.

name: BKRY
desc: Artisan bakery cafe in Alserkal with exceptional sourdough, pastries and speciality coffee.

name: The Espresso Lab
desc: Speciality coffee done with precision in a sleek D3 setting. A must for serious coffee lovers in Dubai.

name: Koncrete
desc: Minimalist coffee bar in Al Quoz with a raw industrial feel, great filter coffee and a calm atmosphere.

name: Bystro
desc: Healthy casual dining with fresh ingredients and feel-good plates. A go-to for the health-conscious crowd.

name: Kif Kif
desc: Fresh healthy meals with Middle Eastern influences. Light, flavourful and genuinely satisfying bowls.

name: Omnia Gourmet
desc: Popular Jumeirah brunch cafe with beautiful food, great coffee and a crowd that knows good things.

name: Pickl
desc: Perfectly executed smash burgers with a loyal Dubai fanbase. Simple menu, consistently brilliant.

name: Pitfire Pizza
desc: Artisan woodfired pizza with creative topping combos and a loyal JLT lunch crowd. Never a bad slice.

name: Wokyo
desc: Healthy Asian noodle bowls built your way. Light, fast and genuinely satisfying for a weekday lunch.

name: Mannaland
desc: Generous Korean BBQ feast with tabletop grills, banchan and soju flowing freely all evening.

name: Little Lamb Hot Pot
desc: Interactive Chinese hot pot dining where you cook at the table. Lively, messy and deeply satisfying.

name: Din Tai Fung
desc: Globally loved chain famous for its XLB soup dumplings. The queues are worth every single minute.

name: Zaroob
desc: Colourful, buzzy Levant street food restaurant with mezze, manakish and a fun chaotic energy.

name: Gazebo
desc: Classic Mughlai flavours done reliably well. The butter chicken and dal makhani are city benchmarks.

name: Bombay Bungalow
desc: Modern Indian cuisine with a beachside vibe. Great cocktails, bold flavours and a buzzy crowd.

name: Al Safadi
desc: Classic Lebanese dishes done well — mezze spreads, grills and fresh bread that never disappoint.

name: Bosporus
desc: Authentic Turkish breakfast spreads and grills. The pide bread and sucuk eggs are a weekend ritual.

name: Mythos Kouzina
desc: Cosy neighbourhood Greek tavern with proper mezze, grilled octopus and a warm welcoming atmosphere.

name: Eataly
desc: Italian market dining where you shop, eat and cook. Fresh pasta, pizza al taglio and gelato all under one roof.

name: Cheesecake Factory
desc: Enormous menu with something for everyone. The cheesecakes alone are worth the trip to Dubai Mall.

name: Black Tap
desc: Over-the-top crazy milkshakes and big sloppy burgers. Come for the gram, stay for the food.

name: Al Hallab
desc: Classic Lebanese dining and desserts from a Beirut institution. The knafeh and baklava are non-negotiable.

name: Barbar
desc: Famous Lebanese street food chain done with quality. The manakish and shawarma are genuinely excellent.

name: Reem Al Bawadi
desc: Traditional Arabic grill house with generous mezze spreads, mixed grills and warm hospitality.

name: Mama Zonia
desc: Jungle-themed Asian dining with creative fusion plates and a lush tropical atmosphere that transports you.

name: Cafe Bateel
desc: Elegant Mediterranean cafe dining with date-inspired treats, great coffee and refined all-day plates.

name: Lana Lusa
desc: Portuguese comfort food done with soul. Bacalhau, pasteis de nata and a warm neighbourhood vibe.

name: 21 Grams
desc: Beloved Balkan brunch spot with hearty plates, excellent coffee and a queue that tells the whole story.

name: Little Bali
desc: Indonesian comfort food bringing the flavours of Bali to JLT. Nasi goreng, rendang and satay done right.

name: The Noodle House
desc: Casual pan-Asian comfort dishes in a vibrant setting. Great for groups with big shared plates.

name: Social House
desc: Global comfort cuisine with something for everyone. A solid choice when the group can't agree on one thing.

name: Hunter & Barrel
desc: Premium steakhouse with a rustic lodge feel, wood-fired cooking and cuts that justify every dirham.

name: Texas Roadhouse
desc: American steakhouse classic with generous portions, fresh-baked bread and legendary ribs.

name: Aprons & Hammers
desc: Messy seafood feast with whole crabs, lobster and prawns in bold sauces. Bibs on, phones out.

name: The Maine Oyster Bar
desc: Fresh oysters, seafood platters and cocktails by the beach. Sophisticated but never stuffy.

name: Bussola
desc: Italian dining with gorgeous marina views, wood-fired pizza and handmade pasta done with care.

name: Fi'lia
desc: Modern Italian cuisine by a celebrated chef. Beautiful pastas, wood-fired dishes and effortless elegance.

name: Il Borro Tuscan Bistro
desc: Elegant Tuscan cuisine with handmade pasta, truffles and an Italian wine list that goes deep.

name: Scalini
desc: Luxury Italian classic beloved by Dubai's elite. Flawless pasta, impeccable service, unforgettable.

name: Orfali Bros Bistro
desc: Award-winning Middle Eastern cuisine pushing boundaries with creativity and impeccable technique.
vibe: The best meal you'll have in Dubai

name: Jun's
desc: Creative Asian fusion with bold flavours and beautiful presentation. One of Downtown's most exciting tables.

name: Coya
desc: Vibrant Peruvian dining hotspot with incredible ceviche, pisco sours and an atmosphere that buzzes.

name: Fusion Ceviche
desc: Fresh ceviche and Peruvian plates in a casual JLT setting. Light, zingy and genuinely impressive.

name: Mimi Kakushi
desc: Elegant Japanese restaurant with a secret garden atmosphere, creative omakase and stunning presentation.

name: Roka
desc: Contemporary Japanese robata grill with bold flavours, stunning presentation and a buzzing atmosphere.

name: Reif Japanese Kushiyaki
desc: Creative Japanese skewers and small plates from one of Dubai's most exciting chefs. Always a vibe.

name: Kokoro
desc: Minimalist Japanese dining in Alserkal with precise technique, seasonal ingredients and quiet elegance.

name: Shanghai Me
desc: Elegant Chinese fusion in a dramatic DIFC setting. Dim sum, Peking duck and cocktails that dazzle.

name: Teible
desc: Creative farm-to-table dining in the Jameel Arts Centre. Seasonal, thoughtful and genuinely memorable.

name: 11 Woodfire
desc: Wood-fired grill mastery with exceptional cuts, live fire cooking and an intimate atmosphere.

name: Avatara
desc: Michelin-starred vegetarian fine dining redefining Indian cuisine. Breathtaking tasting menus, zero meat.
vibe: Vegetarian fine dining at its peak

name: Indya by Vineet
desc: Modern Indian cuisine by Michelin-starred chef Vineet Bhatia. Bold flavours with a creative contemporary twist.

name: Bombay Brasserie
desc: Contemporary Indian dishes inspired by the streets of Mumbai. Vibrant, flavourful and great for groups.

name: Tandoor Tina
desc: Fun Indian street food with a focus on tandoor-cooked dishes and bold Dilli-style flavours.

name: Punjab Grill
desc: Fine Indian dining with elevated Punjabi classics, beautiful interiors and an impressive wine list.

name: MyGovinda's
desc: Pure vegetarian Indian food with a spiritual touch. Creative dishes, zero meat, maximum flavour.

name: Wild & The Moon
desc: Organic plant-based food done beautifully. Cold-pressed juices, wholesome bowls and guilt-free indulgence.

name: Tania's Teahouse
desc: Charming themed cafe with afternoon tea, pretty cakes and a cosy nook perfect for lazy afternoons.

name: Saya Brasserie
desc: Pretty pink cafe vibes with great brunch plates and coffee in a City Walk setting that always delivers.

name: Salt
desc: Beachside wagyu sliders from a converted Airstream. The original Dubai food truck success story.

name: Five Guys
desc: Classic American burgers with fresh never-frozen beef and bottomless free peanuts. Always reliable.

name: Shake Shack
desc: The global ShackBurger classic, always consistent. Pair it with a concrete and you're sorted.

name: High Joint
desc: Dubai's cult burger favourite. Thick patties, stacked toppings and a queue that says everything.

name: Freedom Pizza
desc: Clean-ingredient pizzas with a health-conscious approach. Great for when you want pizza without the guilt.

name: Rossovivo
desc: Authentic Neapolitan pizza with a proper wood-fired oven. Soft, charred, chewy — the real deal.

name: Motorino
desc: Authentic New York-style pizza with a thin crispy base and toppings that don't mess around.

name: 800 Pizza
desc: Award-winning pizza with a devoted Dubai following. Creative toppings and a perfectly blistered crust.

name: Circle Cafe
desc: All-day brunch cafe that's been a Dubai staple for years. Solid food, great coffee and familiar comfort.

name: Friends Avenue Cafe
desc: Neighbourhood brunch cafe in JLT with a warm atmosphere, good coffee and plates that hit the spot.

name: Boston Lane
desc: Hidden brunch gem in Al Quoz with exceptional coffee, creative plates and a loyal local following.

name: The Hamptons Cafe
desc: Beach-style brunch cafe with a breezy Hamptons aesthetic, wholesome plates and great iced coffee.

name: LDC Kitchen
desc: Healthy casual dining with fresh, clean ingredients and flavourful bowls that don't sacrifice taste.

name: Soulgreen
desc: Plant-based dining done beautifully at Dubai Creek Harbour. Wholesome, creative and genuinely satisfying.

name: Beef King
desc: Japanese wagyu specialist in Deira with premium A5 cuts, shabu shabu and a serious beef experience.

name: Wagamama
desc: Japanese-inspired ramen and noodle bowls served fast in a buzzy communal setting. Always reliable.

name: Little Bangkok
desc: Thai comfort food that transports you straight to Bangkok. The pad thai and green curry are benchmarks.

name: Cafe Isan
desc: Authentic Thai cuisine with northeast Thai specialties that you rarely find elsewhere in Dubai.

name: The Thai Kitchen
desc: Classic Thai dishes done with care and consistency. A solid neighbourhood spot for a reliable Thai fix.

name: Nene Chicken
desc: Korean fried chicken done crispy and saucy. The yangnyeom sauce is the kind of thing you dream about.

name: Kimpo
desc: Modern Korean dining with a buzzy atmosphere, great small plates and a solid soju selection.

name: Seoul Garden
desc: Korean BBQ favourite with sizzling tabletop grills, generous cuts and a lively dinner atmosphere.

name: Nando's
desc: Famous peri-peri chicken that needs no introduction. Always consistent, always satisfying.

name: Texas Chicken
desc: Crispy fried chicken done the American way. A fast food classic that hits the spot every time.

name: Chicking
desc: Middle East's own fried chicken chain with crispy coatings and bold flavours at unbeatable prices.

name: Jollibee
desc: The iconic Filipino fast food chain beloved across the world. Chickenjoy and palabok that hit different.

name: Burger Fuel
desc: Gourmet burger chain from New Zealand with quality ingredients and a no-compromise attitude to beef.

name: Operation Falafel
desc: Levant street food done fresh and fast. The falafel wrap is dangerously addictive every single time.

name: Laffah
desc: Famous shawarma spot with charcoal grills and a loyal local following that keeps the queues long.

name: Automatic Restaurant
desc: Beirut-style mezze and grills that have fed Dubai's appetite for Lebanese food since forever.

name: Sultan Baba Iskender
desc: Authentic Turkish iskender kebab done the traditional way — tender lamb, tomato sauce and butter.

name: Otantik
desc: Traditional Turkish cuisine with meze, grills and a warm Anatolian atmosphere that feels genuinely homely.

name: The Farm
desc: Stunning garden restaurant in Al Barari surrounded by lush greenery. A magical escape from the city.

name: Reform Social & Grill
desc: British gastropub-style food and drinks with a relaxed lakeside setting. Proper comfort food done well.

name: Eggspectation
desc: All-day breakfast spot with a massive menu of egg dishes, pancakes and brunch plates.

name: Parker's
desc: Trendy burger and fries spot at La Mer with a fun beachy atmosphere and solid comfort food.

name: Falla
desc: Fun comfort food in City Walk with creative twists on American classics. Great for a casual bite.

name: Society Cafe
desc: Creative brunch dishes in a chic Jumeirah setting. Beautiful plates, great coffee and a buzzy crowd.

name: Toby's Estate
desc: Australian coffee culture done right. Single origins, flat whites and a laid-back café vibe.

name: Bounty Beets
desc: Healthy colourful brunch with vibrant bowls, smoothies and feel-good plates that look as good as they taste.

name: Cassette
desc: Creative art district cafe in Al Quoz with a retro aesthetic, great coffee and thoughtful brunch plates.

name: La Nena
desc: Cosy Spanish cafe with tapas, tortilla and cafe con leche that make you feel like you're in Barcelona.

name: One Life Kitchen
desc: Healthy brunch favourite in D3 with nourishing plates, excellent juices and a mindful approach to food.

name: Rise & Dawn
desc: Specialty coffee and brunch in a bright Jumeirah spot. Beautifully crafted drinks and creative plates.

name: Paus Cafe
desc: Minimalist brunch cafe in Umm Suqeim with a calming atmosphere, great coffee and clean simple plates.

name: LILA Molino
desc: Authentic Mexican taqueria in Alserkal with hand-pressed tortillas, slow-cooked meats and brilliant salsas.

name: Taqado Mexican Kitchen
desc: Mexican burrito bowls and wraps built fresh to order. Fast, flavourful and great for a weekday lunch.

name: Maria Bonita
desc: Authentic Mexican food with a festive atmosphere, great margaritas and tacos that hit every time.

name: Muchachas
desc: Mexican tacos and bowls with a Marina view and a lively crowd. Casual, fun and consistently good.

name: Cactus Cantina
desc: Mexican grill house with fajitas, enchiladas and a fun cantina atmosphere that keeps locals coming back.

name: Little Erth
desc: Healthy casual food in Al Safa with wholesome ingredients and a neighbourhood feel that keeps regulars loyal.

name: Jones The Grocer
desc: Australian cafe classic with artisan groceries, great coffee and all-day dining in a deli-style setting.

name: Baker & Spice
desc: Farm-to-table cafe with organic ingredients, freshly baked bread and wholesome all-day plates.

name: Seva Table
desc: Plant-based wellness cafe with a serene atmosphere, nourishing bowls and food that genuinely heals.

name: Planet Terra
desc: Vegan comfort food that proves plant-based can be indulgent, creative and completely satisfying.

name: Green Earth Cafe
desc: Healthy vegan meals in a relaxed Al Barsha setting. Fresh, clean and honest food at fair prices.

name: Veganity
desc: Creative vegan dishes with bold flavours and beautiful presentation that converts even the sceptics.

name: Krave
desc: Healthy bowls and smoothies with fresh ingredients and vibrant flavours. Great for a quick nourishing meal.

name: The Lime Tree Cafe
desc: A Dubai original that has been serving wholesome brunches and legendary carrot cake since 2001.

name: Arrows & Sparrows
desc: Neighbourhood brunch cafe in The Greens with a homely feel, great coffee and plates that always satisfy.

name: Mitts & Trays
desc: Creative brunch spot in Jumeirah known for its imaginative plates, beautiful desserts and warm service.

name: Harvest & Co
desc: Garden brunch cafe with a farm-inspired feel, fresh ingredients and a relaxed Jumeirah atmosphere.

name: Cafe Rider
desc: Motorcycle-themed cafe in Al Quoz with speciality coffee, loaded sandwiches and a crowd that knows what's up.

name: Single Fin Cafe
desc: Surf-style brunch cafe with a breezy atmosphere, great coffee and feel-good plates by the beach.

name: Brunch & Cake Wasl
desc: The Wasl branch of the beloved Instagram brunch cafe. Same beautiful plates, same great coffee.

name: Nolu's
desc: Afghan-Californian fusion that sounds unusual but tastes extraordinary. Unique flavours in a relaxed setting.

name: Nayaab Haandi
desc: Famous Pakistani handi and BBQ in Al Nahda. The slow-cooked handi is rich, aromatic and deeply satisfying.

name: Pak Liyari Restaurant
desc: Authentic Karachi-style biryani that hits every time. Rich, aromatic and generous portions at honest prices.

name: Kabab Al Afghani
desc: Authentic Afghan kebabs grilled over charcoal. Simple, smoky and absolutely worth seeking out.

name: Al Aroos Damascus
desc: Syrian shawarma and grills done the Damascus way. Tender meat, fresh bread and garlic sauce that lingers.

name: Al Tawasol Restaurant
desc: Affordable Arabic grilled dishes served generously. A reliable neighbourhood spot for a filling meal.

name: Gazebo
desc: Classic Mughlai biryani and kebabs done reliably well. The butter chicken and dal makhani are city benchmarks.

name: Calicut Notebook
desc: Kerala seafood and curries bursting with spice and freshness. The fish curry is absolutely legendary.

name: Salkara Restaurant
desc: Traditional Kerala cuisine with home-style cooking that feels warm and genuine. Fish curry and appam done right.

name: Saravanaa Bhavan
desc: Iconic vegetarian chain famous for its dosas and South Indian breakfast spreads done just right.

name: A2B Veg Restaurant
desc: South Indian comfort food classics — idli, vada, dosa and filter coffee. Consistent and always satisfying.

name: Little Manila
desc: Filipino street food that brings a taste of Manila to Al Nahda. Sinigang, lechon and halo-halo done right.

name: Hot Palayok
desc: Authentic Filipino comfort food — adobo, kare-kare and lechon kawali that'll make you feel at home.
vibe: Filipino home cooking away from home

name: Wokyo
desc: Healthy Asian noodle bowls built your way. Light, fast and genuinely satisfying for a weekday lunch.

name: Chicking
desc: Middle East's own fried chicken chain with crispy coatings and bold flavours at unbeatable prices.

name: Texas Chicken
desc: Crispy fried chicken done the American way. A fast food classic that hits the spot every time.

name: Nando's
desc: Famous peri-peri chicken that needs no introduction. Always consistent, always satisfying.

name: Operation Falafel
desc: Levant street food done fresh and fast. The falafel wrap is dangerously addictive every single time.

name: Laffah
desc: Famous shawarma and sandwiches with charcoal grills and a loyal following that keeps the queues long.

name: Al Safadi
desc: Classic Lebanese dishes done well — mezze spreads, grills and fresh bread that never disappoint.

name: Bosporus
desc: Authentic Turkish kebabs and breakfast spreads. The pide bread and sucuk eggs are a weekend ritual.

name: Zaroob
desc: Colourful buzzy Levant street food restaurant with mezze, manakish and a fun chaotic energy.

name: Filli Cafe
desc: The home of karak tea in Dubai. Silky, spiced and satisfying — the chai that built a loyal city-wide following.

name: Tea Junction
desc: Quick tea and snacks done cheap and cheerful. The go-to spot for a karak and samosa.

name: Project Chaiwala
desc: Modern chai cafe bringing desi tea culture with creative chai flavours in a cool setting.

name: Panoor Restaurant
desc: Kerala seafood and grills with authentic coastal flavours. The fish fry and prawn curry are must-orders.

name: Trèsind Studio
desc: One of the world's best restaurants. A modern Indian tasting experience that redefines everything you think you know about Indian cuisine.

name: Gaia
desc: Upscale Greek seafood restaurant in DIFC with stunning interiors, fresh catches and a buzzing energy.

name: Alici
desc: Southern Italian seafood dining on Bluewaters Island. Fresh pasta, pristine fish and a stunning waterfront setting.

name: Pierchic
desc: Dubai's most iconic pier restaurant perched over the Arabian Gulf with spectacular Burj Al Arab views and impeccable seafood.

name: Ninive
desc: Luxury Middle Eastern dining in a magical garden setting at Emirates Towers. Theatrical, beautiful and delicious.

name: Sirene by Gaia
desc: Mediterranean beachfront dining with fresh seafood, gorgeous views and the effortless elegance of the Gaia group.

name: Tasca
desc: Modern Portuguese cuisine by a celebrated chef inside the Mandarin Oriental. Refined, creative and deeply memorable.

name: Carbone
desc: The legendary New York Italian-American institution at Atlantis The Royal. Bold flavours and unmistakable glamour.

name: Signor Sassi
desc: Elegant Italian classic dining with impeccable pasta, premium ingredients and a sophisticated atmosphere.
